case_title: WILLIAM I. LEDFORD VS. SFMTA et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEDFORD, WILLIAM I. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SFMTA PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST AUTO TOW IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO MAR-27-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE SUBMITTED TO COURT TODAY, PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE BOTH DEFENDANTS AGAIN, PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANTS DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS AT TODAYS HEARING. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANTS WERE REPRESENTED BY BOB LONG--ADJUSTER; DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE (AUTORETURN); MIKE HANRAHAN--ASST MGR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS NOT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-27-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL.APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MAXINE ANDERSON--CCSF/SFMTA, DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE, SF AUTO RETURN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108); FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEDFORD, WILLIAM I.
